content: Next.js 16 official docs (nextjs.org/docs/app/guides/preventing-flash-before-hydration, updated 2026-06-23) recommend an inline blocking script in <head> reading localStorage and setting a data-theme attribute on <html> before paint, paired with suppressHydrationWarning on <html>. next-themes (v0.4.6) automates this exact pattern via ThemeProvider with attribute='class', injecting the same blocking script automatically.
